title: viola diffusa subsp. tenuis
intro: Viola diffusa subsp. tenuis, also known as Chinese viola or yellow violet, is a perennial plant that belongs to the viola family. It is widely used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola diffusa subsp. tenuis include reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, or in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
